photography.notes: Edited high-resolution images delivered via private online gallery within 14 days.
photography.terms: 50% retainer due at booking; balance due before final delivery. Images licensed for personal use — commercial licensing available on request.

graphic-design.notes: Final files delivered as AI, SVG, PNG and PDF on receipt of payment.
graphic-design.terms: 50% due upfront, 50% on delivery. Two revision rounds included; further revisions billed at the hourly rate above. Full usage rights transfer on final payment.

web-development.notes: Source code delivered via private Git repository on payment.
web-development.terms: Payment due within 14 days of invoice date. Work on subsequent milestones begins once payment clears.

items.desc: Blog article — research, writing, 1 revision round (per word)

writing.notes: One revision round included per article; further revisions billed separately.
writing.terms: Payment due within 14 days. A 50% kill fee applies to commissioned work cancelled after drafting begins.

consulting.notes: Summary of findings and recommended next steps delivered separately.
consulting.terms: Net 15. Late payments accrue 1.5% monthly interest. Work beyond the agreed scope is quoted separately.

tutoring.terms: Payment due before the first session of the month. Sessions cancelled with less than 24 hours' notice are billed in full.

items.desc: Filming day rate — crew of one, camera & audio

videography.notes: Two revision rounds included on the edit; further rounds billed hourly.
videography.terms: 50% deposit reserves the shoot date; balance due on delivery of final files. Raw footage available for an additional fee.

cleaning.terms: Payment due on the day of service. Cancellations with less than 48 hours' notice incur a 50% fee.

plumbing.notes: Service address: [address]. Licensed & insured — license #[number]. Labor warrantied for 90 days.
plumbing.terms: Payment due on completion. Parts carry the manufacturer's warranty; labor warrantied 90 days from service date.

electrician.notes: Work performed to NEC and local code. Licensed & insured — license #[number].
electrician.terms: Payment due on completion for service work; Net 15 on contractor accounts. Labor warrantied 12 months from service date.

items.desc: Lawn maintenance — mow, edge, blow (per visit)

landscaping.notes: Service address: [address]. Service period: [month]. Weather-delayed visits roll to the next scheduled day.
landscaping.terms: Recurring maintenance invoiced monthly, due within 7 days. Projects over [amount] require a 50% materials deposit before scheduling.

handyman.notes: Service address: [address]. Additional tasks quoted and approved on site before work began.
handyman.terms: Payment due on completion. Two-hour minimum applies to all service visits.

auto-repair.notes: Vehicle: [year make model] — plate [number], [mileage] mi. Work authorized by customer on [date].
auto-repair.terms: Payment due on vehicle pickup. Parts & labor warrantied 12 months / 12,000 miles, whichever comes first.

catering.notes: Event: [date, venue]. Final guest count of [number] confirmed [date]. Deposit of [amount] received [date] — balance shown below.
catering.terms: 50% deposit reserves the event date. Final guest count due 7 days before the event; invoiced count is the greater of guaranteed and actual. Balance due on or before event day.

personal-training.notes: Pack valid for 12 weeks from first session. Sessions: [gym / online]. Progress check scheduled at session 10.
personal-training.terms: Packages payable in full before the first session. Cancellations with less than 24 hours' notice count as a completed session.

items.desc: Surface prep — patch, sand, caulk & mask

painting.notes: Colors: [names/codes]. Two coats throughout; touch-up walkthrough completed [date]. Leftover paint labeled and left with client.
painting.terms: One-third deposit to schedule; balance due on completion after final walkthrough. Workmanship warrantied for 2 years.
